Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I only sense a faint presence. It seems so close, but... I can't reach it...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}All right, we can split up and search for it. There's no time to lose, so let's hurry![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Please, I can do it! This is what I'm here for![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Feel the movement of the earth through your fingertips...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Hear the answer of the wind flow through your hair...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Taste the knowledge of the water on your lips...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Tell me, Lucia... What shrouds me from the truth?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Don't break her concentration.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}A web...? Perhaps it's related to the old power cables underground.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Back when the island was still being developed, this is where the main power station was located.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Yes, a large number of power cables remain underground in a sprawling network, much like a web.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}So that's what's interfering with her ability?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Thank you, Aigis. I've figured it out now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 2 25 25}It's not that the cables are interfering...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}...The cables themselves have been possessed by the Shadow![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}So, everything under our feet is part of the Shadow!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}No wonder you couldn't pinpoint it. It's covering this entire area.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}H-How are we supposed to beat something like that!?[n]{f 1 1}
